Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function, and mildly elevated ALT, indicating possible liver involvement. Total protein and globulin are low, which may reflect nutritional deficiency or protein loss. Lipid profile reveals mildly increased triglycerides and LDL cholesterol. Other parameters are within normal limits. Recommend further evaluation of renal and liver function and assessment for possible protein loss or malnutrition.
